revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-560

An antenna comprising a reflector whose shape is that of a paraboloid of revolution or a parabolic cylinder, and a feed usually situated approximately at the focus of the reflector (if of the first type) or on the focal line of the reflector (if of the second type).

Reference: B.S. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
